## Intent

Describe the narrow outcome this change delivers.

## Scope

- [ ] Application change
- [ ] Platform or pipeline change
- [ ] Documentation only

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant browser or visual checks

## Failure isolation

Explain what still works if this change fails.

## Security and data

Describe permissions, validation, secrets, and sensitive-data impact.

## Rollback

State the exact rollback action.

## Visual reference

Link the approved reference when the change affects UI. Do not merge unapproved screen work.
